frontend_constraints.name: Clear CTA Labels
frontend_constraints.evidence: All CTAs use action-oriented language: 'Get Free Solar Assessment', 'Schedule Consultation', 'Browse Portfolio', 'Chat Now', 'Call Now', 'Message on WhatsApp'. No generic 'Submit' or 'Click here' labels.

frontend_constraints.name: No Raw Values
frontend_constraints.evidence: design-system.md and design-system.tokens.json contain all color, typography, spacing, motion values. Component specs reference tokens only. No hardcoded #hex, px, or ms values outside design system.

frontend_constraints.name: Mobile-First Responsive
frontend_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md defines breakpoints (xs, sm, md, lg, xl). All pages specify responsive intent per breakpoint. MobileBottomNav mandatory on <lg. Mobile-first CSS stacking specified.

frontend_constraints.name: Hero Text Contrast
frontend_constraints.evidence: pages/home.md specifies: gradient overlay 50%+ coverage, opacity >=0.55, trust chips dark-pill (rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) + white text = 6:1 AAA. All hero text >= 4.5:1 contrast (design-system.md verified).

frontend_constraints.name: Touch Target Sizing
frontend_constraints.evidence: All buttons sized >=44x44px for mobile. Page briefs specify button sizing. Icon buttons (20px icons) in touch-friendly spacing. Form fields have 16px padding minimum.

frontend_constraints.name: Form Error Handling
frontend_constraints.evidence: pages/contact.md specifies: inline field validation, red border + error message per field, aria-describedby linking. Errors on blur (not keystroke). Toast for network errors.

frontend_constraints.name: Focus Visible
frontend_constraints.evidence: design-system.md defines focus ring: 3px solid var(--color-primary-500), 2px offset. Applied to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields, tabs). component-system.md notes focus state for all components.

frontend_constraints.name: Image Alt Text
frontend_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 13) and pages/*.md require descriptive alt text for all images. Hero images, portfolio gallery, team photos, blog featured images all need alt text.

frontend_constraints.name: Page Load Performance
frontend_constraints.evidence: All pages specify LCP target <2.5s. Hero image optimized (WebP/AVIF, <200KB). Google Maps lazy-loads on scroll. No critical render-blocking resources. JavaScript budget 60-80KB per page.

frontend_constraints.name: Animation Loops
frontend_constraints.evidence: motion-system.md specifies: no infinite animations except loaders (800ms spin) and auto-rotating carousels (5s, auto-pause on hover/focus). All decorative animation forbidden.

frontend_constraints.name: No Hover-Only Discovery
frontend_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 7) specifies: all CTAs (phone, WhatsApp, contact form) discoverable within 1 tap mobile. No hover-only menus. Touch-friendly on all surfaces.

frontend_constraints.name: Form Multi-Step
frontend_constraints.evidence: pages/contact.md specifies: 3-step form with auto-advance, localStorage persistence, data recovery on refresh. Step indicator shows progress. Back button available.

frontend_constraints.name: Reduced Motion Compliance
frontend_constraints.evidence: motion-system.md: every animation has @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) fallback (instant, no animation). design-system.md CSS rule disables all animations globally when prefers-reduced-motion enabled.

frontend_constraints.name: Footer Attribution
frontend_constraints.evidence: brief.json specifies footer_attribution (text: 'Built by', link_text: 'Growrix OS', url: 'https://www.growrixos.com'). master-ui-architecture.md (section 8) declares placement: footer_bottom_bar. All page footers reference this.

frontend_constraints.name: Social Icons
frontend_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 7) specifies: topbar social links (14px icons), footer social row (20px icons), all platforms (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn). Icons + aria-label, no text-only.

frontend_constraints.name: Mobile Bottom Navigation
frontend_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 5) declares MobileBottomNav: 5-tab icon bar (Home, Services, Portfolio, Contact, More) on <lg breakpoints. component-system.md includes MobileBottomNav spec.

frontend_constraints.name: WhatsApp + Phone CTAs
frontend_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 7) specifies: phone icon + WhatsApp icon in sticky header. Contact page (pages/contact.md) has dual CTAs. All pages allow contact within 1 tap mobile.

accessibility_constraints.name: Semantic HTML Landmarks
accessibility_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 13) requires: <main> for content, <nav aria-label="Primary navigation">, <footer>, <section aria-labelledby="heading"> for major sections. All page briefs follow this structure.

accessibility_constraints.name: Heading Outline
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All page briefs specify valid H1→H2→H3 progression without skips. Home: H1 (hero) → H2 (services, testimonials, cta). Contact: H1 (page title) → H2 (form, map, hours).

accessibility_constraints.name: Skip Link
accessibility_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 13) declares skip link: 'Skip to main content', keyboard-only visible, top of page, focus-visible outline. Implemented in header component.

accessibility_constraints.name: Form Labels
accessibility_constraints.evidence: pages/contact.md specifies: all form fields have visible <label for="id"> associations. Multi-step form labels: 'Email Address', 'Full Name', 'Phone Number', 'Message', etc.

accessibility_constraints.name: Error Messages Linked
accessibility_constraints.evidence: pages/contact.md specifies: error messages linked to fields via aria-describedby. Field errors on blur (not keystroke). Error list announced via aria-live="polite" for quick remediation.

accessibility_constraints.name: Keyboard Navigation
accessibility_constraints.evidence: master-ui-architecture.md (section 13) and interaction-matrix.md specify: Tab order logical (LTR, top-to-bottom). Enter to submit forms. Arrow keys for carousel/tabs. Escape closes modals. All interactive elements keyboard-accessible.

accessibility_constraints.name: Modal Focus Management
accessibility_constraints.evidence: component-system.md (Modal spec) requires: focus trap (tab cycles within modal), initial focus on primary button, Escape key closes and returns focus to trigger. Backdrop click closes.

accessibility_constraints.name: Image Alt Text
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All page briefs require descriptive alt text: hero images, portfolio before/afters, team member photos, blog featured images. No generic 'image' or 'photo' alt text.

accessibility_constraints.name: Color + Icon for Meaning
accessibility_constraints.evidence: design-system.md specifies: form errors use red border + error icon + error text (not red alone). Success uses green checkmark + success message. Status indicators include icon + label + aria-live text.

accessibility_constraints.name: Form Validation Timing
accessibility_constraints.evidence: pages/contact.md specifies: validation on blur or submit (not keystroke). Prevents frustration. Email validation checks format on blur. Phone validation on blur.

accessibility_constraints.name: ARIA Live Regions
accessibility_constraints.evidence: interaction-matrix.md requires: form submission status announced via aria-live="polite". Carousel navigation announced. Error list updates announced. Toast notifications have role="status" aria-live="assertive".

accessibility_constraints.name: Reduced Motion Support
accessibility_constraints.evidence: design-system.md CSS rule: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disables all animations, transition-duration: 0.01ms. motion-system.md specifies fallback for every animation. Tested via DevTools emulation.

content_validation.forbidden_words_audit: passed (no lorem, todo, coming soon, sample)

performance_targets.lazy_loading_strategy: Images, maps, heavy components on scroll
performance_targets.font_loading: system stack (no custom fonts), fallback to sans-serif

open_questions: Should home hero feature video background or static image? (Choose one)
Are customer testimonials from Google Reviews or provided by client?
What's the priority metric for home page (installations, years, satisfaction, warranty)?
Should featured projects include video testimonials?
Should contact page embed live chat widget (e.g., Intercom)?
Calendly embed for scheduling or sales team callback preferred?
Auto-trigger welcome email on form submission?
Track contact method conversion (phone vs email vs WhatsApp)?
next_steps: frontend_developer: Clone planning folder, consume per ai-context.yaml, begin implementation
backend_planner: Review brief.json + pages/*.md for API contracts (lead capture endpoint: POST /api/contact)
qa_planner: Build test matrix based on site-inventory.md + pages/*.md + component-system.md
stakeholders: Review brief.json (success metrics) + frontend.json (lock status)
